headline: BRMSTE · cuQuantum GPU kit
definition: NVIDIA cuQuantum state-vector / tensor-network acceleration for BRMSTE quantum circuits. GPU-gated: requires an NVIDIA GPU + CUDA Toolkit. On CPU-only hosts the kit is declared but inactive; Qiskit Aer is the CPU fallback.

requires.note: pip install cuquantum-python fails without CUDA Toolkit — use cuquantum-python-cu12 on CUDA 12 hosts

backend_bind.note: Qiskit Aer can offload to cuQuantum via AerSimulator(device='GPU') when the GPU build is installed
